channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Balancing Art and Ethics: The Case for Separating Artists' Lives from Their Work
item.description: The article explores the complex relationship between artists and their work, using the example of Rabbi Shlomo Carlebach and Roger Waters. A film about Carlebach's life, titled 'The Darkest Light,' h...

item.title: Saskatoon Resident Takes Initiative to Improve Pedestrian Safety with Crosswalk Paintings
item.description: Derek Cameron, a Saskatoon resident, took matters into his own hands by painting crosswalk lines on Main Street and Lake Crescent after growing concerned about unsafe parking practices near pedestrian...

item.title: Analyst Reflects on Lindsey Graham's Death and His Motivations for Supporting Trump
item.description: The article discusses the death of Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) and an analysis of his decision to support President Donald Trump. Political analyst Will Saletan, writing for The Bulwark, suggests Gr...

item.title: Democrats Gain Momentum in Maine Senate Race After Candidate Drops Out
item.description: The article discusses how Democrats have gained significant momentum in the Maine Senate race following the withdrawal of candidate Graham Platner. Platner suspended his campaign after multiple allega...

item.title: Marc Marquez extends championship challenge with Sachsenring triumph
item.description: Seven-time MotoGP world champion Marc Marquez secured a dominant victory at the Sachsenring circuit, adding to his sprint race win and strengthening his position in the championship battle. The Ducati...

item.title: Tanzania Prisons Struggle to Secure Premier League Spot After Defeat
item.description: Tanzania Prisons football team faces a challenging situation after suffering a 4-0 defeat to Tanzania Police in the first leg of their crucial playoff match. The loss puts their Premier League status ...

item.title: England's World Cup Potential: Overcoming Challenges to Reach New Heights
item.description: England's football team, led by captain Harry Kane, is striving to reach new heights in the World Cup after a hard-fought quarter-final victory over Norway. Manager Thomas Tuchel expressed dissatisfac...

item.title: Tanzania’s top businessman backs Dangote’s Kenya refinery with $100m investment
item.description: Mohammed Dewji, Tanzania’s wealthiest businessman, has offered to invest $100 million in Aliko Dangote’s planned oil refinery in Kenya. Despite preferring the project to be built in Tanzania, Dewji su...

item.title: Mitch McConnell's Health Statement Sparks Analysis on Political Transparency
item.description: U.S. Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) faced scrutiny after his recent hospitalization and a public statement about his health, which political analyst Robert Davis described as a 'definin...

item.title: Lindsey Graham Dies from Aortic Rupture: Medical Examiner Confirms Cause of Death
item.description: Lindsey Graham, the 71-year-old South Carolina Senator, died from an aortic rupture caused by hardened arteries, according to preliminary findings from the District of Columbia Medical Examiner. The c...

item.title: Morogoro Development Projects Struggle with Delays and Poor Quality
item.description: Residents and local leaders in Morogoro region are expressing frustration over the slow implementation and poor quality of development projects, raising concerns about the effective use of public fund...

item.title: Flipkart terminates delivery agent after woman alleges sexual misconduct in Bengaluru incident
item.description: A 22-year-old Flipkart delivery agent was arrested after a woman in Bengaluru alleged that he forcibly entered her apartment, exposed himself, and violated her privacy. Police registered a case under ...

item.title: Nigeria's Oil Output Surpasses OPEC Quota, Hits Six-Year High
item.description: Nigeria has again surpassed its OPEC-mandated production ceiling for the second consecutive month, with June crude oil output soaring to an average of 1.56 million barrels per day (mbpd). This product...

item.title: Jannik Sinner Defends Wimbledon Title with Dominant Four-Set Victory Over Alexander Zverev
item.description: Jannik Sinner successfully defended his Wimbledon title with a hard-fought four-set victory over Alexander Zverev in the 2026 final. The world No. 1, who had previously lost the first set to Zverev, s...

item.title: Lindsey Graham Dies at 71 from Aortic Dissection, Medical Examiner Reports
item.description: The article details the sudden death of U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, who passed away on July 11, 2026, at the age of 71 from a brief and sudden illness. Emergency dispatch audio reviewed by Fox News D...

item.title: Toronto Man Arrested After Shootout and Rideshare Theft with Passenger Inside
item.description: A 25-year-old man from Brampton was arrested after a chaotic incident on Polson Street and Cherry Street in Toronto. Police responded to gunfire around 3:30 a.m. and reported an exchange of fire betwe...

item.title: Andrew Upton Discusses His Debut Novel 'Krank Fuss', a Fable Inspired by War and Farm Life
item.description: Australian playwright, producer and director Andrew Upton has released his debut novel, 'Krank Fuss', an allegorical fable reminiscent of Animal Farm. The story centres on a disfigured chicken named K...

item.title: NBI Director Asks for Earlier Testimony in VP Sara Impeachment Trial
item.description: National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag has requested the House prosecution panel to allow him to testify earlier in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. This c...

item.title: Lindsey Graham's foreign policy legacy and impact on US global strategy
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, a prominent Republican from South Carolina, passed away at 71, leaving a significant void in American foreign policy. Known for his deep understanding of international affairs, Gr...

item.title: ANC's 2026 LGE strategy targets DA dominance in Western Cape municipalities
item.description: The ANC is intensifying its campaign for the November 4, 2026 Local Government Elections, focusing on five key municipalities in the Western Cape to challenge the DA's control. ANC Western Cape Provin...
